document.source_title: Amid NEET-UG paper leak row, Centre clears two joint secretaries, joint directors for NTA

claims.claim_text: The government announced that the NEET-UG test would be computer-based from next year.
claims.evidence_text: the government announcing that the test would be computer-based from next year onwards

claims.claim_text: The NEET-UG exam was cancelled over paper leak allegations.
claims.evidence_text: the NEET-UG exam on May 3 which was cancelled earlier this week over paper leak allegations

entities.name: Anuja Bapat
entities.description: 1998-batch Indian Statistical Service officer appointed as joint secretary in NTA.
entities.evidence_text: Anuja Bapat, a 1998-batch Indian Statistical Service officer, and Ruchita Vij, a 2004-batch IRS (Customs and Indirect Taxes) officer, have been appointed as joint secretaries in the NTA

entities.name: Ruchita Vij
entities.description: 2004-batch IRS (Customs and Indirect Taxes) officer appointed as joint secretary in NTA.
entities.evidence_text: Ruchita Vij, a 2004-batch IRS (Customs and Indirect Taxes) officer, have been appointed as joint secretaries in the NTA

entities.name: Akash Jain
entities.description: 2013-batch IRS (Income Tax) officer appointed as joint director in NTA.
entities.evidence_text: Akash Jain, a 2013-batch IRS (Income Tax) officer, and Aditya Rajendra Bhojgadhiya, a 2013-batch Indian Audit and Accounts Service officer, have been appointed as joint directors in the NTA

entities.name: Aditya Rajendra Bhojgadhiya
entities.description: 2013-batch Indian Audit and Accounts Service officer appointed as joint director in NTA.
entities.evidence_text: Aditya Rajendra Bhojgadhiya, a 2013-batch Indian Audit and Accounts Service officer, have been appointed as joint directors in the NTA

entities.name: National Testing Agency (NTA)
entities.description: Agency responsible for conducting the NEET-UG exam.
entities.evidence_text: the appointment of two joint secretaries and two joint directors to the National Testing Agency (NTA)

events.event: Appointment of joint secretaries and directors in NTA
events.evidence_text: the Appointments Committee of the Cabinet on Saturday cleared the appointment of two joint secretaries and two joint directors to the National Testing Agency (NTA)
the retest now scheduled on June 21

metrics.name: Candidates who took NEET-UG exam
metrics.evidence_text: Over 22 lakh candidates had taken the NEET-UG exam on May 3

citations.title: Amid NEET-UG paper leak row, Centre clears two joint secretaries, joint directors for NTA

source_credibility.reason: The source is a reputable news outlet providing detailed information on government appointments and educational reforms.
